data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to confirm the presence of an 'emergency override' feature that allows a manager to force assignment. However, the evidence provided does not include any checks or confirmations that such a feature exists or functions as required. The linked use case mentions the need for this feature, but there is no evidence that it has been implemented or validated, indicating a clear gap in the requirement.
gaps: No evidence of the emergency override feature allowing manager to force assignment.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for emergency override feature
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Verify that the manager can force assignment of a substitute.
